content.text: Bump the default request timeout in the HTTP client config from 30 to 60 seconds.

content.content:
from __future__ import annotations

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
class HttpClientConfig:
    """Runtime configuration for the shared outbound HTTP client.

    All fields have safe defaults so callers can construct the config with no
    arguments in tests and only override the knobs they care about.
    """

    base_url: str = "https://api.internal.example.com"
    user_agent: str = "clinescope-httpclient/1.4"
    max_connections: int = 100
    max_keepalive: int = 20
    verify_tls: bool = True
    follow_redirects: bool = True
    request_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0
    connect_timeout_seconds: float = 5.0
    retry_attempts: int = 3
    retry_backoff_seconds: float = 0.25
    enable_http2: bool = False
    proxy_url: str | None = None

input.input:

*** Update File: src/clients/http_config.py

     base_url: str = "https://api.internal.example.com"

     max_keepalive: int = 20
     verify_tls: bool = True
     follow_redirects: bool = True
-    request_timeout_seconds: float = 30.0
+    request_timeout_seconds: float = 60.0
     connect_timeout_seconds: float = 5.0
     retry_attempts: int = 3
     retry_backoff_seconds: float = 0.25
     enable_http2: bool = False
     proxy_url: str | None = None
*** End Patch
